arguments.argument: makeActive() setCollisionBounds(-5,-5,5,5) image_speed=0.25 image_xscale=2 image_yscale=2 yVel=-4 yVelLimit=8 decayTime=450 if global.location=15 or global.location=103 {sprite_index=sCVChicken} if global.location=29 or global.location=104 {sprite_index=sMMHealthPickup} if global.location=49 or global.location=106 {sprite_index=sMetroidHealthPickup} alarm[0]=1
